title: Nanopore Aliquoting
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol pools 1-6 destination plates from all columns to the first 4 wells in column 1 for each respective plate. Destination plates should loaded onto the deck in order of lowest to highest, depending on the number of plates selected (up to 6). That is, for two plates, load the plates in slots 4 and 5. For detailed protocol steps, see below.
steps_raw: This protocol pools 1-6 destination plates from all columns to the first 4 wells in column 1 for each respective plate. Destination plates should loaded onto the deck in order of lowest to highest, depending on the number of plates selected (up to 6). That is, for two plates, load the plates in slots 4 and 5. For detailed protocol steps, see below.
Aspirate 20ul from column 12 to column 7 on plate 1.
Dispense all aspirations into column 1 of the respective plate.
Aspirate 20ul from column 6 to column 2 on plate 1.
Dispense all aspirations into column 1 of the respective plate.
Move wells E1-H1 in column 1 to A1-D1 in column 1.
materials_raw: Combo 96 Well Plate Black Label on Nest Plate 300µL
